evaluation.expected_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ORDER BY NAME
evaluation.generated_sql: SELECT name FROM mondial_gpt.mountain ORDER BY name ASC

experiment_eval.original_intent: Find mountains on islands along with the island names.

turns.user_query: Which mountains are located on islands and what are the island names?
turns.agent_reply: The database identifies 197 mountains located on islands. Examples include Aenos on Kefallinia, Agung on Bali, Andringitra on Madagaskar, Asahi-Dake on Hokkaido, and Attavyros on Rhodos.

evaluation.text_to_sql_input: Which mountains are located on islands and what are the island names?
evaluation.user_intention: Find mountains on islands along with the island names.
evaluation.expected_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN, MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN
evaluation.generated_sql: SELECT mi.name AS island_name, mmi.mountain AS mountain_name FROM mondial_gpt.island mi JOIN mondial_gpt.mountainonisland mmi ON mi.name = mmi.island

experiment_eval.original_intent: Find mountains and their provinces along with the population of the provinces.

turns.user_query: Which mountains belong to provinces along with their population?
turns.agent_reply: The database links 727 mountains to provinces along with their population. Examples include Jezerce and Korab in Albania (population: 2,821,977), Aenos in Ionion Nison (population: 207,855), and Smolikas in Ipeiroy (population: 336,856).

evaluation.text_to_sql_input: Which mountains belong to provinces along with their population?
evaluation.user_intention: Find mountains and their provinces along with the population of the provinces.
evaluation.expected_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN, MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_PROVINCE.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME
evaluation.generated_sql: SELECT mp.name AS province_name, mp.population AS province_population, mm.name AS mountain_name FROM mondial_gpt.province mp JOIN mondial_gpt.geo_mountain gm ON mp.name = gm.province JOIN mondial_gpt.mountain mm ON gm.mountain = mm.name

experiment_eval.original_intent: Retrieve the countries where the mountains are located.

turns.user_query: Can you provide the names of the countries where these mountains are located?
turns.agent_reply: The database lists mountains located in 727 records linked to countries. Examples include China, Georgia, the United States, and Zimbabwe.

evaluation.text_to_sql_input: Provide the names of the countries where the mountains in the database are located.
evaluation.user_intention: Retrieve the countries where the mountains are located.
evaluation.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN
evaluation.generated_sql: SELECT c.name FROM mondial_gpt.country c JOIN mondial_gpt.province p ON c.code = p.country JOIN mondial_gpt.geo_mountain gm ON p.name = gm.province
